evals.prompt: Use the sqli-gan-survey skill to survey the SeqGAN clones under D:\GAN_Final\Product\GAN_Methods\SeqGAN. Report the original input contract, pipeline data forms, and minimal changes needed before using the two SQLi datasets. Do not train.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown survey focused on SeqGAN reproduction with input paths, token-id format, pipeline steps, dataset replacement requirements, and smoke-run notes.
expectations: The output distinguishes observed code facts from proposed minimal changes.
The output says whether toy/oracle data is used and where SQLi token-id data would enter.
The output avoids recommending architecture upgrades or full training.

evals.prompt: Use the sqli-gan-survey skill to profile the Modified_SQL_Dataset and Kaggle_SQL_Injection_Dataset, then explain how their text/label schema compares with the input requirements of CTGAN, SeqGAN, TextGAN, and LeakGAN. Do not create training adapters.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown report with dataset profiling results and a cross-model comparison of input compatibility and needed pre-training transformations.
expectations: The output includes read-only dataset profiling notes.
The output lists intermediate data forms for all four methods.
The output marks directions 1-7 as survey-first and 8-10 as accepted minimal-change directions.

evals.prompt: Use the sqli-gan-survey skill to produce a reproduction survey for CTGAN, SeqGAN, TextGAN, and LeakGAN on a laptop with 20GB RAM and RTX 3050 4GB. Focus on smoke-run feasibility and minimal code changes.
evals.expected_output: A reproduction-oriented Markdown survey that covers all four methods, hardware constraints, smoke-run strategy, and what not to change.
expectations: The output includes hardware-aware smoke-run recommendations.
The output identifies hard-coded paths/configs as likely minimal-change targets.
The output states that full training is not the default next action.
